purpose: Hand-curated parity pairs for bottom-up prototype-to-Storybook css-visual-diff workflow. Acts as the source-of-truth queue/inventory for comparison configs, selectors, status, outputs, and accepted differences.

entries.notes: Both sides render the same fixture label, primary style, Get tickets text, and chevron/right icon in the atom diff fixture. Completed first iteration successfully.

comparison.cssDiff: none after removing auto-size width/height/box-sizing probes from root style props

comparison.cssDiff: accepted implementation-shape differences: React Card root uses border-box and delegates padding/background to body; box-shadow string differs while screenshots are pixel-identical at threshold 30

entries.notes: First molecule comparison accepted. Screenshot crops are 260x66 on both sides; pixeldiff reports 0/17160 changed pixels for component and root. CSS differences are implementation-shape differences rather than visual drift.

acceptedDifferences.reason: Prototype Card applies padding directly on a content-box root; React Card uses a border-box root plus padded body slot. Bounds and pixels match.
Tokenized React shadow serializes as two layers while pixel diff is 0.0000% for the fixture crop.
Prototype root explicitly sets default; React non-interactive root inherits auto/default behavior with identical pixels.

entries.notes: Modal default is close but not accepted. Header/body are pixel-perfect; panel/footer still differ due 1px crop/rounding and footer/button-region pixels after React Modal alignment. Needs a second pass before marking accepted.

entries.notes: Newly added coverage target; not tuned yet.
Prototype is table row; React is unstyled inline/flex-ish div with role label. Coverage valid; needs styling/taxonomy follow-up.
Prototype hand-rendered from ticket CTA/card motif; React TicketStub lacks matching CSS. Coverage valid; needs design decision/styling.
Prototype archive stats use public archive page four-stat strip; React composes generic Stat cards. Coverage valid; needs public-specific styling or accepted composition decision.
Prototype year header from archive page; React has close structure but token/font/spacing differences. Coverage valid.
Prototype archive row vs React show row are related but not identical: React includes door/price/age stack. Coverage valid; may need separate archive-row vs upcoming-show-row taxonomy.
Very close public shell component; residual logo color/text anti-aliasing differences remain, kept needs-review pending intentional accepted-difference decision.
Coverage target; success state is implementation-only/hand-rendered prototype approximation.
Major mismatch: prototype booking aside copy/dark card vs React light rules list.
Major design mismatch: prototype ethos is light about-page section; React EthosStrip is dark full-width strip.
Coverage target only; prototype combines PageHeader/about intro while React AboutHero is simplified tagline hero.
Large taxonomy/style mismatch: prototype source is dark booking space aside while React VenueCard is light card/map placeholder.
Coverage target; prototype find-us text block vs React info card have related content but different structure/style.
Coverage target only; prototype hand-rendered public hero differs from React hero structure/actions.
Coverage target; prototype fixture is hand-rendered CTA motif, React is bordered card with form controls.
Close but not accepted: logo color differs in React/root evidence and small spacing/font differences remain.

Coverage target for the larger public booking workflow. Prototype form has fewer/different fields and underline controls; React BookingForm uses current atom inputs/selects/textareas and additional fields, so this remains needs-review rather than a pixel-tuning target until taxonomy/field parity is decided.
